description.ko: 유리 꽃잎 구조가 흰 에너지를 빠른 무지개 카스틱으로 흩뿌리는 PRISM-2 굴절의 빛나는 순간.
description.en: A radiant PRISM-2 refraction bloom where a glass blossom scatters white energy into fast rainbow caustics.

prompt: PRISM-2 bright refraction flare inside a seamless sun-white vacuum: a weightless optical blossom made from ultra-clear glass crescent petals, slotted crystal shutters, and tiny suspended bead lenses opens around a pulsing white energy seed. The seed releases rapid radial flashes through the curved petals and narrow slots, scattering into vivid light dispersion sprays of #FF0080 magenta, #00FF80 mint green, #8000FF violet, and #FFFF00 yellow. Rainbow caustics appear as floating petal-shaped arcs, sharp spectral crescents, and luminous interference ripples in the air, with crisp chromatic aberration tracing every polished glass rim. Bright pure-energy mood, fast motion streaks, low sparse particles, clean optical clarity, transparent internal reflections, no tabletop setup, no dark surface, no traditional triangular prism, no single straight beam.
